session.user:
Run this command and report results:
`uv run pytest tests/commands/pr/ -v --tb=short`
Report summary: how many passed, how many failed, and the names of any failing tests.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for the PR commands tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run PR command tests with verbose output and short tracebacks
